components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main action button used throughout the system.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #0e7490; color: #fff; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 6px; border: none; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.875rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #0891b2; }

components.name: Clinical Card
components.description: Standard container for patient records and dashboard widgets.
components.css: .ds-card-clinical { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 6px; padding: 24px; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 12px; color: #0f172a; } .ds-card-content { font-size: 0.875rem; color: #64748b; }

components.name: Triage Badge
components.css: .ds-badge-triage { padding: 4px 8px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-triage-1 { background: #fee2e2; color: #ef4444; border: 1px solid #fecaca; }

narrative.overview: Cliniq HIS is designed for high-stress medical environments where clarity, speed, and accuracy are paramount. The aesthetic philosophy is 'Sterile Modernism'—a clean, high-contrast interface that prioritizes legibility and information density without feeling cluttered.

rules.name: The Triage Hierarchy Rule
rules.body: Vibrant colors are reserved strictly for patient status and triage levels.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Elevation is only used to indicate interaction.

dos: Do use clinical teal for primary actions.
Do prioritize information density in patient dashboards.
donts: Don't use soft 'pill' shapes for buttons.
